name: paper-source
description: Paper Source finds, deduplicates against Paper Wiki backlogs, ranks, parses, stages, and hands off paper evidence for Paper Wiki-compatible vaults.

interface.shortDescription: v2.3.11 | Paper Source: discover, dedupe, cross-discipline quality gates, DOI-required recommendations, diagnostics, record.
interface.longDescription: Paper Source is the source/evidence layer for PaperFlow: configure profile-driven discovery, run discover-papers for natural-language paper search, deduplicate against wiki _meta/reference-index.json before raw source bundles, record transparent query plans with hard/soft constraints, optionally use configured grok-search-rs MCP as targeted or parallel supplemental recall without replacing paper-search MCP, enrich DOI/code metadata, apply cross-discipline quality gates with explicit identity/relevance/inspectability/validation/source-confidence/reproducibility/request-risk dimensions, treat paper-search-mcp as retrieval and metadata coverage rather than a semantic quality ranker, emit DOI-required non-Reject session_recommendations for chat-facing reading decisions with zero-primary and quality-reject diagnostics, auto-stage selected primary PDF-available recommendations, acquire PDFs or manual-download records, parse with MinerU, recover configured MinerU CDN ZIP downloads in fake-IP environments, preserve source bundles, produce Chinese approval reports, record explicit human or Codex automation approval metadata, hand off via wiki-ingest-brief.json and wiki-agent-trigger.json, and record final wiki ingest. Paper Wiki or another wiki-capable agent owns formal page writing.
defaultPrompt: Set up Paper Source / PS configuration.
Use Paper Source / PS to find, dedupe, rank, diagnose, and stage high-quality papers.
Prepare selected papers for Paper Wiki handoff and record wiki ingest.
